items.title: Backend type-check passes after rewire + deletions
items.precondition: Repo read access restored; all backend edits + deletions applied.
items.evidence: tsc EXIT:0, 0 errors (after StageReadMetadata type-alias fix).

items.title: Frontend type-check passes after card removal
items.precondition: All frontend edits applied; PatientJourneyArrowHelp deleted.

items.title: Patient-journey service test passes with 3-stage funnel
items.expected: All tests pass; stage order is impressions/visits/leads.

items.title: No residual feature references in application code
items.expected: Only migration-history files match (create + drop migrations); zero application-code hits.
items.evidence: Hits confined to src/database/migrations/* (20260624, 20260626 history + 20260630 drop).

items.title: Backend convention strict gate clean
items.expected: Exit 0; 0 backend structural violations from this change.
items.notes: §11.7 heuristic (84) is pre-existing/advisory; this change only removes models.

items.title: Drop migration up/down round-trips on the dev database
items.precondition: Migration 20260630000000 deployed to dev; create migrations already applied on dev.
steps: 1. dev deploy runs npm run db:migrate (drops keyword_search_volume + market_* on dev)
3. npm run db:rollback recreates structure (verify down())
items.expected: up() drops all three tables; down() recreates structure cleanly.
items.notes: Verified on dev (where tables exist), not local — local DB lacks these tables / has history mismatch.

items.title: Funnel screen renders without the Search Opportunity card
items.precondition: Deployed to dev; authed user on a location with patient-journey data.
items.expected: Pipeline shows 3 cards (Google Visibility → Website Visitors → Website Leads), no Search Opportunity card, no orphan leading arrow; header reads 'Three gates'; detail deck for the head shows GSC content (no keyword estimates).
items.notes: Human/computer-use verify on dev after deploy.

items.title: Dev Redis: market-intelligence / search-volume jobs + queues cleared
items.precondition: ssh alloro-dev; worker redeployed without MI worker.
steps: 1. List repeatable jobs on harvest-market-intelligence + harvest-search-volume
items.expected: Zero MI/search-volume repeatable jobs; no bull:harvest-market-intelligence:* / bull:harvest-search-volume:* keys.

items.title: Prod Redis: market-intelligence / search-volume jobs + queues cleared
items.precondition: ssh alloro-app; merged to main + worker redeployed.
steps: 1. List repeatable jobs on both queues
items.expected: Zero MI/search-volume repeatable jobs and queue keys on prod.

items.title: Prod tables dropped at main deploy
items.precondition: Merged to main; deploy ran db:migrate on prod.
steps: 1. After prod deploy, confirm keyword_search_volume + market_* gone on prod DB
items.expected: Tables dropped on prod; health check green.

items.title: DataForSEO credentials removed from server env
steps: 1. Remove DataForSEO key lines from /etc/alloro/dev.env (and app.env if present)
items.expected: Env no longer contains DataForSEO keys (grep by key name); PM2 healthy.

items.title: Plan + memory artifacts removed, tombstone left
items.expected: MI plan folders gone; tombstone + changelog present; memory updated.
